API
pages.description: Documentation for the Hyperliquid public API

pages.title: Info endpoint
pages.description: The info endpoint is used to fetch information about the exchange and specific users. The different request bodies result in different corresponding response body schemas.

pages.title: Perpetuals
pages.description: The section documents the info endpoints that are specific to perpetuals. See Rate limits section for rate limiting logic and weights.

pages.title: Spot
pages.description: The section documents the info endpoints that are specific to spot.

pages.title: Exchange endpoint
pages.description: The exchange endpoint is used to interact with and trade on the Hyperliquid chain. See the Python SDK for code to generate signatures for these requests.

pages.title: Subscriptions
pages.description: This page describes subscribing to data streams using the WebSocket API.

pages.title: Post requests
pages.description: This page describes posting requests using the WebSocket API.

pages.title: Timeouts and heartbeats
pages.description: This page describes the measures to keep WebSocket connections alive.

pages.title: Priority fees
pages.description: Advanced feature for latency-sensitive users

pages.title: Nodes
pages.description: Documentation for running nodes

pages.title: Read Me - Support Guide
pages.description: This Support Guide is meant to help you resolve common issues that users face on Hyperliquid.

pages.title: Connected via wallet
pages.description: Description: I can’t connect my wallet to Hyperliquid / I'm stuck in a loop when trying to sign / My wallet isn’t responding. What should I do?

pages.title: Connected via email
pages.description: Description: I no longer receive verification codes to login with email

pages.title: Deposit or transfer issues (missing / lost)
pages.description: Here are the guides in this section:

pages.title: Deposited via Arbitrum network (USDC)
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Arbitrum network

pages.title: Deposited fiat
pages.description: Description: You deposited USDC using fiat, which is managed by Swapped.com

pages.title: Deposited via Bitcoin network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Bitcoin network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Deposited via Ethereum network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Ethereum network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Deposited via Solana network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Solana network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Deposited via Avalanche network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Avalanche network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Deposited via Base network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Base network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Deposited via Monad network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Monad network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Deposited via Plasma network
pages.description: Description: You deposited via the Plasma network, which is managed by Unit Protocol.

pages.title: Transfer or deposit to USDC (Perps) missing
pages.description: Description: You transferred USDC from your Spot to Perps balance or deposited USDC via Arbitrum and can’t figure out where it went or why you are not able to use the USDC in your Perps balance.

pages.title: Withdrawal issues
pages.description: Here are the guides in this section:

pages.title: Withdrawal has not arrived in my wallet
pages.description: Description: You made a withdrawal, but your funds have not arrived in your wallet or intended destination.

pages.title: My withdrawal keeps getting re-deposited
pages.description: Description: You made a withdrawal, but your funds have been re-deposited.

pages.title: Withdrawing to Phantom Wallet
pages.description: Description: You are connected using Phantom Wallet and face issues with withdrawal

pages.title: Trade outcome looks incorrect
pages.description: Here are the guides in this section:

pages.title: Why was I liquidated?
pages.description: Description: Your perps position was liquidated and you see "Market Liquidation" in your Trade History

pages.title: How does margining work?
pages.description: Description: You have open cross margin positions and don’t understand how margin is attributed to positions

pages.title: My TP/SL did not execute correctly
pages.description: Description: You set a TP/SL and believe it was not executed correctly

pages.title: I can't sell leftover spot assets
pages.description: Description:  I have a small amount of a spot asset that I can’t sell

pages.title: What does "Action already expired" mean?
pages.description: Description: You received an error message saying '"Action already expired"' when placing an order

pages.title: HyperEVM issues
pages.description: Here are the guides in this section:

pages.title: Accidentally transferred to HyperEVM
pages.description: Description: You clicked the “Transfer to/from EVM” button and can’t figure out what happened

pages.title: Can’t see my HyperEVM assets in wallet extension
pages.description: Description: You are using the EVM and don’t see your assets on the EVM in your wallet extension

pages.title: Gas problem on EVM
pages.description: Description: You are having issues paying for gas or getting transactions through on the HyperEVM

pages.title: Unstaking & link staking issues
pages.description: Here are the guides in this section:

pages.title: Unstaking transfer taking more than 7 days
pages.description: Description: You believe that you unstaked HYPE and the transfer has taken >7 days. Your unstaked HYPE has not reached your Spot balance

pages.title: Staking and trading account linking issues
pages.description: Description: You have questions after linking a staking and trading account

pages.title: Building on Hyperliquid
pages.description: Here are the guides in this section:

pages.title: I have API related questions
pages.description: Description: You are building on HyperCore or HyperEVM

pages.title: I want to deploy a spot token or list a perp
I got scammed/hacked
pages.description: Description: Your account was compromised / you see transactions you did not authorize / your funds are missing.
